name: Dragolithia Kunzite
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>玲瓏竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴリシア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クンツァイド
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can send 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Normal Monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use 1 "Dragolithia Kunzite" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can send 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Normal Monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use 1 "Dragolithia Kunzite" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can send 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster from your hand or Deck to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Normal Monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use 1 "Dragolithia Kunzite" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
